Gros choc à la tête sans perte de conscience. Wife is PD01421. Been from 2010 to 2015 on opioids for pain. RBD + Sleep apnea CPAP (2013). Non epileptic seizures, onset age 44, adm to seizure monitoring unit at MNI, had spells but no electrographic correlate. Chronic pain, mostly localized to left lower abdomen, thought to be related to diabetic neuropathy. Cataracts. Left knee arthritis.

Suivi depuis plusieurs années pour épilepsie (related to right occipital megalencephaly). Ostéoporose et congestions nasales. 08/2020: hypotension durant visite chez médecin. A travaillé 3 mois durant sa vingtaine dans une usine de peinture: avait les mains dans les solvants tous les jours. A épandu 1 fois en 2018 des pesticides sur sa pelouse. Ingénieur Industriel: BA. A travaillé toute sa vie en usine mais dans les bureaux. Travaille présentement temps plein de chez lui.
Participante veut seulement participer à la biobanque du C-BIG.

Conjointe est PD01388. Hypothyroidism et Dyslipidemia around 2014. Prior surgery for ankle injury around 1994 and C4 vertebral fracture from a fall (hurt head in pool) around 1984. Hx of minor concussions. 30 yrs Hx of pesticides exposure (travaillé chez un grossiste en fruits/légumes). Mother with AD.
23-04-2021: est venu en pm: n'a pas pu faire la prise de sang.

column40: We attempted to perform the blood draw on this participant, but their veins were incredibly deep and our phlebotomist was unable to draw blood for the study.

The spouse of the participant passed away on Sept 2nd/2023. Due to this, I will not be asking for the MBI-C to be completed.  Additionally, our phlebotomist had to attend an urgent meeting during our study time, so we were unable to get a blood draw. Will re-schedule.
